steps.expression: async () => { let memberAgentId = null; const listAgents = await window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: '', tagFilter: '', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page: 1 }); if (listAgents.ok && listAgents.value.items.length > 0) { memberAgentId = listAgents.value.items[0]?.id ?? null; } if (memberAgentId === null) { const settingsView = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!settingsView.ok) { throw new Error(settingsView.error.userMessage); } const modelEntry = Object.entries(settingsView.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0); if (modelEntry === undefined) { throw new Error('No existing agent and no available model in catalog for scenario seeding.'); } const [providerId, models] = modelEntry; const modelId = models[0]; if (typeof modelId !== 'string' || modelId.length === 0) { throw new Error('Unable to determine model id for scenario agent seeding.'); } const saveAgent = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: 'Scenario Config Agent', systemPrompt: 'You are a concise scenario helper.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull: { providerId, modelId } }); if (!saveAgent.ok) { throw new Error(saveAgent.error.userMessage); } memberAgentId = saveAgent.value.agent.id; } const result = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: 'Config Inline Council', topic: 'Original topic text', goal: 'Original goal text', mode: 'manual', tags: ['alpha'], memberAgentIds: [memberAgentId], memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: null }); if (!result.ok) { throw new Error(result.error.userMessage); } return result.value.council.id; }
() => { const button = document.querySelector("button[aria-label='Edit topic']"); if (!(button instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Edit topic button not found'); } button.click(); }
() => { const button = document.querySelector("button[aria-label='Edit topic']"); if (!(button instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Edit topic button not found'); } button.click(); }
() => { const button = document.querySelector("button[aria-label='Edit goal']"); if (!(button instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Edit goal button not found'); } button.click(); }
() => { const tagsButton = document.querySelector("button[aria-label='Edit tags']"); return tagsButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? tagsButton.disabled : null; }

() => { const button = document.querySelector("button[aria-label='Edit conductor model']"); if (!(button instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Edit conductor model button not found'); } button.click(); }
